mapper.select: SELECT m.music_id AS musicId, m.track_name AS trackName, m.artist_name AS artistName, a.album_name AS albumName, a.album_cover_url AS albumCoverUrl FROM music_features m LEFT JOIN albums a ON m.album_id = a.album_id WHERE m.track_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.artist_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.album_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
